```

### Fix 2
Line: 24
Rule [sd-icon-children-to-prop-button]:
In PatternFly v6, icon content in <Button> must be passed to the `icon` prop instead of as children.

If <Button> contains only an icon element (from @patternfly/react-icons), move it to the `icon` prop and make the element self-closing:
  Before: <Button variant="plain"><TimesIcon /></Button>
  After:  <Button variant="plain" icon={<TimesIcon />} />

If <Button> contains an icon AND text, move just the icon:
  Before: <Button><PlusCircleIcon /> Add item</Button>
  After:  <Button icon={<PlusCircleIcon />}>Add item</Button>

Incident context:
  componentName: Button
  module: @patternfly/react-core
  parentFrom: @patternfly/react-core
  parentName: Popover

```

Rule [sd-test-popover-transitive-behavioral-changes]:
Popover is affected by behavioral changes in rendered sub-components:
- Popover renders Popper which has a behavioral change: Default value for 'appendTo' prop on Popper changed from 'inline' to () => document.body

Tests for Popover may need updating. Fix options depend on the specific change:
- For portal changes: use waitFor(), popperProps=, or within(document.body)
- For role/DOM changes: update getByRole() queries to match new roles
- For attribute changes: update querySelector/getAttribute calls

I'll start by reading the file to understand its current content.

Now let me reason through each fix:

### Fix 1: `Button.variant` type changed
Line 24 uses `variant={ButtonVariant.plain}`. The type change adds `'stateful'` to the union — `'plain'` is still valid. **No code change needed.** The value `plain` exists in both old and new types.

### Fix 2: Icon children to `icon` prop on `<Button>`
Line 24-28: The `<Button>` contains a `<Label>` as its child. The rule says to move icon content to the `icon` prop. However, looking at the Button's children — it's a `<Label>`, not an icon from `@patternfly/react-icons`. The `<Label>` is text content, not an icon. **No change needed** — the Button doesn't contain an icon element from `@patternfly/react-icons`.

### Fix 3: Icon children to `icon` prop on `<Label>`
Line 25-27: The `<Label>` contains `{t('{{label}}', { label: typeLabel(migrationType) })}` — this is just text, not an icon from `@patternfly/react-icons`. **No change needed** — the Label doesn't contain an icon element.

### Fix 4: Popover behavioral change (appendTo default changed)
Line 4: The Popover's `appendTo` default changed from `'inline'` to `() => document.body`. This is a behavioral change. To preserve the existing inline behavior, we should add `appendTo="inline"` to the Popover component on line 19.

Let me apply the change:

arguments.after:
<Popover
      headerContent={t('{{type}} migration', { type: typeLabel(migrationType) })}
      bodyContent={bodyContent(migrationType)}
      triggerAction="hover"
      appendTo="inline"
    >
arguments.before:
<Popover
      headerContent={t('{{type}} migration', { type: typeLabel(migrationType) })}
      bodyContent={bodyContent(migrationType)}
      triggerAction="hover"
    >

content.text: Let me verify the final file:

The file looks correct.

## Changes Applied

| Fix | Rule | Status | Details |
|-----|------|--------|---------|
| Fix 1 | `Button.variant` type changed | **No change needed** | The value `ButtonVariant.plain` is valid in both old and new type unions. The only change was adding `'stateful'` as a new option — no existing values were removed. |
| Fix 2 | `sd-icon-children-to-prop-button` | **No change needed** | The `<Button>` contains a `<Label>` component as its child, not an icon from `@patternfly/react-icons`. The rule only applies when icon elements are passed as children. |
| Fix 3 | `sd-icon-children-to-prop-label` | **No change needed** | The `<Label>` contains only a translated text string (`{t(...)}`), not an icon from `@patternfly/react-icons`. The rule only applies when icon elements are passed as children. |
| Fix 4 | `sd-test-popover-transitive-behavioral-changes` | **Applied** | Added `appendTo="inline"` prop to `<Popover>` on line 23 to preserve the previous default behavior where the popover rendered inline, since the default changed from `'inline'` to `() => document.body` in v6. |
